case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS LEE CURTIS D

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO DEF.RETURNED. POSTAL EMPLOYEES NOT ALLOWED TO RECEIVE MAIL AT WORK LOCATION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT LEE CURTIS D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE CURTIS D
